coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:12 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:12 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/3. 12:00 at 88%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 12:00 at 88%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/3. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 12:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/3. Power: 85-88%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 33% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 88% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41% through. This is your workout. Own it. 88% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/3. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 2. 1 to go. 21 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 62% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 36 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 62% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 88% for 12:00. Then 4min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 88% × 12:00. Then 4min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 12:00 at 88%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 88% for 12:00. Then 4min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 88% × 12:00. Seated, 85-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 53 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 91% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
